overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic dystopian city during golden hour. The player character moves along elevated roads and sidewalks past holographic advertisements, palm trees, and towering corporate structures toward the Arasaka building.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban roadway with concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the road edge next to a concrete barrier, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: low concrete wall separating road from drop-off
tall palm trees lining the road
large cylindrical structure with rotating holographic advertisements
tall industrial power line tower with multiple cables
traditional rectangular billboard with digital display

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide elevated roadway during golden hour, with the sun casting long shadows. A concrete barrier runs along the left side while palm trees and utility poles line the route. In the distance, a massive cylindrical holographic billboard tower dominates the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with holographic advertisement tower

events.description: turns left at intersection, leaving the elevated road for the sidewalk
passes the large rotating holographic billboard tower on the right

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and proceeding along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red circular traffic sign with white horizontal bar

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at an intersection marked by a 'Do Not Enter' sign, transitioning from road to sidewalk. The holographic billboard tower moves from center to right as the camera passes it. Pedestrians appear walking in the opposite direction along the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along industrial district approaching corporate tower

events.description: enters the shadow cast by the tall Arasaka building, significantly darkening the scene

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the towering Arasaka building, passing pedestrians and industrial structures

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera wearing white shirt and blue pants

entered.detail: massive black corporate skyscraper with Arasaka logo at top
multiple industrial cranes visible against the skyline
metal barricade fencing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment progresses along a sidewalk flanked by industrial fencing on the left and the street on the right. The Arasaka tower looms larger ahead as the camera enters its shadow around the 55-second mark, dramatically changing the lighting. Construction cranes are visible in the distance against the blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated urban corridor that transitions from a sun-drenched roadway into the imposing shadow of a corporate monolith. It begins on a wide concrete road during golden hour, moving past palm trees and utility poles toward a massive cylindrical holographic billboard tower dominating the skyline. As the camera turns left at an intersection marked by a Do Not Enter sign, the perspective shifts from the road to a pedestrian sidewalk, causing the holographic tower to slide from the center to the right of the frame. The scene then progresses past oncoming pedestrians and industrial fencing, with construction cranes visible against the blue sky in the distance. Finally, the camera advances toward the looming Arasaka tower, causing the warm golden light to vanish as the environment is swallowed by the building's deep shadow.
